anomalies.t: 5-day codex pattern continues — today's shape: model `gpt-5-codex-alpha-2025-11-07` returns 404 at proxy http://172.30.0.30:10000/responses. Engine reports model `gpt-5.3-codex` in aw_info.json but CLI requests an alpha model that doesn't exist. Affected today: Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer, Smoke Codex, Changeset Generator (3/3 codex runs failed).

NEW CRITICAL (first Antigravity engine error seen): Smoke Antigravity run 26420288311 failed with `Cannot find module '/home/runner/work/_temp/gh-aw/actions/parse_antigravity_log.cjs'`. Harness packaging bug — module not copied into actions folder for the antigravity engine.

CARRY: Avenger 1/5 runs hit max_turns=25 again ($1.05 wasted). Other 4 runs were short skip-if-match exits (~17-20s). Env-mismatch fix has NOT landed — still seeing 26-turn exhaustion on the one full run.
No squid health failures observed today across 174 runs. Possibly resolved or quiet.

Strong week-over-week recovery — 41.6% (05-23) → 81.1% (05-24) → 94.7% (05-25). Copilot CLI 1.0.52 holding stable; the 5.3% failure rate today concentrated in 1 codex pattern (3 runs) + 1 antigravity harness bug + a few one-offs.

Block rate climbed: 4% (05-24) → 17.9% (05-25). Top blockers are Smoke workflows that intentionally exercise blocked domains (Smoke Copilot 59, Smoke Claude 29, Smoke Pi 20). Non-smoke blockers worth watching: Linter Miner 43, Daily Testify 31, Copilot Opt 36.

Daily Safe Output Tool Optimizer $6.05 today (up from $5.55 yesterday, peak was $8.54). Documentation Unbloat new high-cost entry at $3.55 (24.2-min run). Daily Code Metrics $3.76. These three = $13.36 of $26.23 (51%).
PR Sous Chef execution drift continues — 7-65 turn range across 7 runs today (avg 21.3). Insight resurfaced by cross-run template miner. No fatal failures but variance unstable.
17 Smoke CI runs today, 0 errors. Pattern appears resolved or quiet.

28 Deployment Incident Monitor runs today (highest run-count workflow), 1 error. Most run 1-2 seconds (skip-fast). The 1 failure (run 26411586422, 19.1m, deployment_status event) is the only real agent run; needs follow-up.
Copilot CLI 1.0.52 confirmed stable across 56 copilot runs today. Zero harness ENOENT or anthropic-beta header errors. Yesterday's resolved pattern holds.
